title: SimpleHats
description: A simple Plugin that allows you put a block on your head using /hat
body:
# SimpleHats
### plugin
Its just a basic and simple Plugin that allows you put a block on your head using **/hat**.
This is my second Plugin so please message me on discord if you find any bugs/problems discord:blizzard8562


```
/hat
```
**while holding a block of your choice**

Have fun :)
